_note: Source of truth for every PURSUE drop the Trump administration releases. Append to `drops` array as new drops arrive. The drops tracker page reads this; subscribers get RSS/email notifications when new entries land.

drops.title: Drop 01 - The Foundation Release
drops.summary: First public batch of the Trump administration's PURSUE program. 162 files spanning the FBI, Department of Defense, NASA, and State Department - including FBI Case 62-HQ-83894 (1947-1968), Apollo 12 and 17 lunar imagery, military encounter footage from the Mediterranean to the Indo-Pacific, and four decades of State Department cables.

expected_next.note: Department of War has stated additional files will be added on a rolling basis. This tracker polls war.gov/UFO daily for new content.
